questions.question: What is the safest FreeRTOS primitive for sending structured data between two tasks?
questions.explanation: Queues copy data safely between tasks and block/wake tasks without wasting CPU time.

questions.question: Which API return value should you check after xTaskCreate?
questions.explanation: xTaskCreate returns pdPASS when the task was created successfully.

questions.question: What should you use to protect shared mutable data from two tasks?
questions.explanation: A mutex protects a shared critical section and FreeRTOS mutexes support priority inheritance.

questions.question: Which FreeRTOS APIs are intended for ISR context?
questions.explanation: Use FromISR variants inside interrupts and defer heavier work to tasks.
